nasb.text: but you shall go to my father’s house and to my relatives, and take a wife for my son.’

esv.text: but you shall go to my father’s house and to my clan and take a wife for my son.’

cnv.text: 你要到我的父家，和我的族人那裡去，為我的兒子娶一個妻子。’

ccb.text: 你要到我家乡的亲族中为我儿子物色妻子。’

csbs.text: 而要到我父家、我的亲族那里去，为我的儿子娶妻。’
